name: Crab Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Old Bay or chowder seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix together the crushed crackers and melted butter. Line a 9-inch springform pan with this mixture.
3. Bake for about 10 minutes. Set aside to cool.
4. Reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. With an electric mixer, beat together until fluffy the cream cheese, eggs, and 1/4 cup sour cream.
6. Add the lemon juice, grated onion, Old Bay or chowder seasoning, Tabasco sauce, and ground pepper. Stir in the crabmeat and mix well.
7. Pour into the cooled crust and bake for 50 minutes until the cake sets.
8. Remove from the oven and run a knife around the edge of the cake to loosen it from the pan.
9. Cool on a wire rack. Remove the sides of the pan.
10. Spread the cake with additional sour cream.
